title: quesnelia liboniana
intro: Quesnelia liboniana, also known as the 'Lantern Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, native to the island of Luzon in the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Quesnelia liboniana include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditionally, Quesnelia liboniana is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
